title: stelis tarda
intro: Stelis tarda, also known as the late stelis or mountain stelis, is a species of orchid that is native to the mountainous regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Stelis tarda lie in its roots, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Stelis tarda include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce pain and prevent infections. In herbal preparations, Stelis tarda is often used as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and made into capsules or tablets for oral consumption.
